member.summary: Number of password hash iterations. Office's modern default is 100,000.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Shared.OfficeEncryptionOptions.HashAlgorithm
member.summary: Hash algorithm used for key derivation and integrity.

Adds an editable architecture story using native shapes and connectors.

member.summary: Configures deterministic layout checks performed before a presentation is saved or published.

member.summary: Checks whether explicit slide shapes extend beyond the slide canvas.

member.summary: Checks whether text is clipped after deterministic measurement.

member.summary: Checks whether normal auto-fit would reduce text below the readable threshold.

member.summary: Checks for significant intersections between peer shapes.

member.summary: Checks picture relationships and image parts.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.IncludeVisualSnapshotDiagnostics
member.summary: Includes diagnostics from the shared slide visual snapshot.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.IgnoreContainedShapeCollisions
member.summary: Ignores a collision when one shape fully contains another. This avoids reporting intentional text-on-panel and image-in-frame compositions as collisions.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.AllowDecorativeShapeBleed
member.summary: Allows non-text auto shapes to extend slightly beyond the canvas for intentional full-bleed design.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.MaximumDecorativeBleedPoints
member.summary: Maximum intentional decorative bleed beyond any slide edge, in points.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.MinimumReadableFontSizePoints
member.summary: Minimum acceptable resolved font size in points.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.DefaultFontSizePoints
member.summary: Fallback font size used when a text run does not carry an explicit size.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.MinimumCollisionOverlapRatio
member.summary: Minimum intersection area divided by the smaller shape area before a peer overlap is reported.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.CollisionTolerancePoints
member.summary: Small point-unit tolerance applied to bounds and containment comparisons.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointDeckPreflightOptions.FailureSeverity
member.summary: Lowest finding severity that causes SaveWithPreflight to fail.

member.summary: OfficeIMO can author or edit this feature directly.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointFeatureSupportLevel.PartiallyEditable
member.summary: OfficeIMO can author or edit common cases, but not the full PowerPoint feature surface.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointFeatureSupportLevel.Preserved
member.summary: OfficeIMO should preserve the feature during round-trip saves, but does not expose a rich authoring API.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointFeatureSupportLevel.Unsupported
member.summary: OfficeIMO has no meaningful support for the feature yet.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointUtils
member.summary: PowerPoint utility methods based on the working open-xml-sdk-snippets implementation. CRITICAL: This class contains the exact initialization pattern required to prevent PowerPoint from showing a "repair" dialog. The order and relationship IDs used here are very specific and must not be changed.

member.summary: Property names or dotted paths to expand (descend into) rather than treat as simple values.

member.summary: When true, includes the original object under its path in addition to expanded fields.

member.summary: Maximum recursion depth when expanding nested objects.

member.summary: Header casing strategy for generated column names.

member.summary: Optional prefixes to trim from generated headers.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Ignore
member.summary: Paths to exclude from output.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.IncludeProperties
member.summary: Optional convenience include list using property names or dotted paths. When specified, only matching columns are kept. A match occurs when the full dotted path matches or the last segment matches.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.ExcludeProperties
member.summary: Optional convenience exclude list using property names or dotted paths. A match occurs when the full dotted path matches or the last segment matches. This augments .

member.summary: Optional list of dotted paths to pin to the front of the generated column order when is not specified.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinnedLast
member.summary: Optional list of dotted paths to pin to the end of the generated column order.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PropertyPriority
member.summary: Optional per-column priority ordering. Lower numbers appear earlier. Keys can be dotted paths or property names.
